title: Bank of Canada Summary of Deliberations Release (April 1, 2026)
summary: The Bank of Canada issued a media advisory announcing it will publish a summary of deliberations from its March 18, 2026 interest rate decision on April 1, 2026. This is a container page with zero substantive content - it contains only metadata about an upcoming release, not the release itself.
